description: If you love those dashing divas in the playboy centrefolds, you'll love the cool, casual range of footwear from this cheeky brand! Suitable for the suitably dashing young man-about-town, wear these to impress the girls, while keeping your feet nice and comfy. We recommend wearing these shoes with a clean-look pair of denims from lee and a cool printed tee to leave no doubt about your fashion credibility. Upper Leather upper with perforated side panels and leather inner for enhanced breathability Patent leather overlays on the side panels, with branding and collar Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Lace-ups through metal eyelets for a stylish snug Fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort Mildly padded leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with upraised lugs and branding on the fore-foot and heel for durability, grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
